title: BlightFarm
body:
This resource pack will make regular farming easier as it will highlight already grown crops.

  currently highlighted:
- -wheat crops
- -potatoes crops
- -beetroots crops
- -carrots crops
- -pumpkin stem
- -melon stem
- -pitcher crop
- -berry bush
- -cocoa
- -dead chorus flower
- -amethyst cluster
- -glow berries
- -nether wart
- -beehive
- -bee nest

_write a feedback, bug, suggestion, idea or just contact me:_ **nedust_** _(My discord)_
